summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Inbox Overhaul features (PROMPT_06). All 14 features tested. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Reply button not showing draft card due to missing editingDraft check, (2) Thread API not returning labels for draft detection. All AgentMail interactions are LIVE API calls (not mocked).

minor.issue: Was not returning labels for messages - FIXED by adding labels field to response

ui_bugs.issue: Reply button click didn't show draft card - FIXED by adding editingDraft to condition

passed_tests: Inbox list shows inboxes with message counts (50, 50, 12, 1, 1) and last activity time
Clicking inbox opens thread-based message list (41 threads grouped by thread_id)
Unread threads show orange dot indicator (37 unread indicators found)
Thread item shows subject, sender, preview text, timestamp, and message count badge
Sent badge appears on threads where latest message was sent (3 sent badges found)
Clicking a thread opens ThreadViewer with all messages in collapsible accordion
Latest message auto-expanded on thread open
Messages show sender, timestamp, expand/collapse on click, full body (HTML rendered)
Reply to this thread button visible at bottom of thread
Clicking Reply opens draft card with text area for composing (after fix)
Back button returns to thread list
Tabs (ALL / RECEIVED / SENT) filter the messages correctly (ALL: 41, RECEIVED: 43, SENT: 7)
Search bar filters threads by subject, sender, or text (9 results for 'Product Hunt')
Auto-mark-read working (unread count decreased from 37 to 36 after viewing thread)
Regression: Overview, Tasks, Approvals, Calendar views still work
critical_code_review_comments: Thread grouping logic in InboxesList.js is well-implemented using Map for O(n) grouping
Auto-mark-read calls updateMessageLabels API correctly for each unread message in thread
Draft detection relies on 'draft' label in message labels - now properly returned from thread API
HTML email rendering uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML - consider sanitization for security

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only test requested, but fixed thread API labels)

seed_data_creation: None - using live AgentMail API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inbox overhaul features fully tested. Key data-testids: inboxes-list, inbox-item-{id}, inbox-tab-all/received/sent, thread-item-{thread_id}, unread-indicator, sent-badge, draft-badge, thread-viewer, thread-message-{idx}, thread-back-btn, reply-open-btn, draft-card, draft-edit-btn, draft-send-btn, draft-display, draft-edit-input, inbox-search-input. Two bugs were fixed: (1) MessageViewer.js line 206 - added editingDraft to condition for showing draft card, (2) agentmail.py - added labels field to thread messages response.

mocked_apis.note: ALL AGENTMAIL INTERACTIONS ARE LIVE API CALLS

bugs_fixed.issue: Reply button click didn't show draft card because condition was 'draftMessage || draftText' but draftText is empty string when clicking reply
Thread API was not returning labels for messages, needed for draft detection
